parts.text:
The image shows a species of ant, specifically ***Camponotus flavomarginatus***.

These ants are part of the *Camponotus* genus, commonly known as carpenter ants. This particular species is characterized by its distinct reddish-brown body and the yellowish-gold margins on the edges of its abdominal segments, which give it its name (*flavomarginatus* translates roughly to "yellow-margined").
